description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:latest Docker image and caches the node_modules/ directory. Define two jobs, test_cs and test_units, both running in the default stage. In the test_cs job run npm install then node_modules/eslint/bin/eslint.js src. In the test_units job run npm install then node_modules/mocha-webpack/bin/mocha-webpack --webpack-config webpack.tests.config.js --require tests/setup.js tests/*.spec.js. No special rules, artifacts, or services are needed.
